aka: The Documentary Journey of Madame Anita Conti
this_title: Voyage de documentation de Madame Anita Conti
trans_title: The Documentary Journey of Madame Anita Conti
introduction: The Atlantic Ocean, 1952. French oceanographer Anita Conti documents the turbulent life of a trawler crew. She returns with writings, photographs and 16mm films that recount the power of the ocean, the men’s hard labour and the slimy fish entrails. Louise Hémon reworks this unique material to reveal its full breadth and beauty.
chinese_title: Voyage de documentation de Madame Anita Conti
